description_long: This is a modern two-story house set within a fenced rectangular lot, surrounded by manicured grass and mature trees. The structure features a combination of flat and low-pitched roofs, with a prominent black and gray color palette. The front facade includes a double garage, a paved driveway, and a main entrance partially sheltered by an overhang. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the exterior, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house opens onto a paved patio area, while the side elevations reveal a mix of brick and smooth panel finishes. The landscaping is minimalistic, emphasizing open green space and privacy.
description: A modern two-story house with flat and low-pitched roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and a mix of brick and smooth panel exteriors, set in a fenced lot with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance with overhang, driveway, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the brick facade, large windows, and open grassy backyard with trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the main entry door, vertical window arrangement, and a clear view of the fence and trees.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the paved patio area, back of the garage, and additional windows facing the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a flat overhang, single door, paved approach, and minimalistic landscaping
